fields.description: Flashcards profile for demo course. Generates flashcards from unit content using OpenAI.
Box chat profile with a custom prompt asking for a summary. Uses DirectLLMResponse with streaming.
Chat with function calling. Includes tools like get_context and get_location_content. Custom UI texts and API key.
Streaming chat profile. Custom prompt, custom UI texts, and dedicated API key. Uses ThreadedLLMResponse orchestrator.
Educator assistant for Studio (CMS). Generates quiz questions from unit content. Custom UI texts and API key. No location filter.
Mocked streaming profile for UI testing without a real LLM call. Uses a custom API key (ignored by mock) for config consistency.
